about.title: about me
about.paragraph1: hey! i'm xdearboy — a mid-level devops engineer and fullstack developer. i build practical products: bots, backend services, and fast web apps, all backed by a solid infra/devops foundation. i'm also crazy about photography — check out the gallery section.
about.paragraph2: my focus leans more toward devops: cloud infrastructure, automation, and linux administration; plus fullstack development (python/js/ts/rust). i'm also just a tiny bit into network administration. timezone — utc+3, languages:

items.kubernetes: digging deeper into kubernetes & monitoring (currently learning)
items.devops: automation and devops remain the focus
items.bots: building new bots and backend services for my own projects
items.redesign: gradually moving to the site's new design (this very redesign)
